description: CompositionWhite and black check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar and concealed zippered chest placket, patch pocket with black pipping on the left chest, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-sleeve button flap, shoulder flaps, curved hem and a brand badge above the patch pocketFittingRegularWash careMachine wash with warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironPerfect for style and comfort, this check shirt from spykar is sure to quickly elevate into a wardrobe favourite. Roll out the sleeves for that classic formal look or bunch them together and secure them with the mid-sleeve button flaps for a casual feel. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, it's sure to offer exemplary comfort. Team it with formal pants and leather shoes for a formal look, or with jeans and suede shoes for a semi-formal touche.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
